message:
Add task_type support for adaptive monitoring and metrics

Introduces an optional task type label that can be associated with tasks
for grouping similar work patterns in monitoring and metrics:

CxInner changes:
- Add task_type: Option<String> field
- Initialize to None in new()

Cx public API:
- task_type() -> Option<String>: Returns the current task type label
- set_task_type(impl Into<String>): Sets the label early in task execution

The task type is intended for use by adaptive deadline monitoring to
adjust thresholds based on historical behavior of similar tasks. It's
also useful for metrics aggregation and debugging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
